normalisation: Per-record PLV = |mean(exp(1j * phase_difference))| after 8-13 Hz Butterworth bandpass; cohort value is the per-edge median across records.

signal_processing.cohort_estimator: per-edge median with MAD standard error across records
signal_processing.per_record_estimator: segment mean PLV with standard error across windows

source_dataset.citation: Schalk et al., IEEE Transactions on Biomedical Engineering 51(6):1034-1043, 2004; Goldberger et al., Circulation 101(23):e215-e220, 2000.

source_dataset.name: EEG Motor Movement/Imagery Dataset v1.0.0
